title: GH #11: re-home derived cache/scratch files from .bee/ root into .bee/cache/
action: Move bee's 3 derived/rebuildable scratch files out of .bee/ root into the existing (already gitignored + managed-hash-excluded) .bee/cache/ dir: .inject-cache.json -> cache/inject-cache.json, perf-open.json -> cache/perf-open.json, manifest-hash.json -> cache/manifest-hash.json. New state.mjs cacheFilePath(root,name) + fsutil removeFileIfExists(file). Reads fall back to the legacy root location once; writes go to .bee/cache/ and best-effort delete the legacy file (transparent migration, no data loss). Durable state (state.json/decisions.jsonl/cells/...) and .bee/ subdirs untouched. Updated the coupled allowlists: installer-e2e RUNTIME_CACHE (-> .bee/cache dir skip), hook-contract live-state fingerprint, command-registry perf doc string, and the test assertions that checked the old paths.

truths: inject-cache/perf-open/manifest-hash now write under .bee/cache/, not .bee/ root.
A legacy root-location file is read as a fallback once, then removed on the next write (no dedup/marker/drift loss).
Durable state files and .bee/ subdirs are untouched.
artifacts: Full 21-suite verify green after mirror sync + manifest regenerate.
Migration test (legacy fallback read + cleanup) + updated perf/manifest/installer/hook-contract assertions.
prohibitions: Do NOT move durable state (state.json, decisions.jsonl, cells/, etc.).
No mirror left out of sync; no literal cache path left pointing at .bee/ root.

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash

trace.verification_evidence:
Before (GitHub #11): bee wrote 3 derived/scratch files directly into .bee/ root next to durable state — .inject-cache.json (dedup cache), perf-open.json (perf session marker), manifest-hash.json (registry drift cache) — cluttering the dir and making cleanup unclear.
After: all three re-homed under the existing .bee/cache/ (already gitignored + excluded from managed hashing). Reads fall back to the legacy root file once; writes go to .bee/cache/ and best-effort remove the legacy file (transparent migration, no dedup/marker/drift loss). Durable state + .bee/ subdirs untouched.
Evidence: test_lib 338/0 incl a migration test that seeds a legacy .bee/.inject-cache.json, asserts shouldInject honors it via fallback, then markInjected writes .bee/cache/inject-cache.json AND deletes the legacy file; test_bee_cli 143/0 (perf/manifest assertions updated to .bee/cache/); test_hook_contracts 0 failing (live-state fingerprint updated); test_installers_e2e bash 16/0 (RUNTIME_CACHE now skips the .bee/cache dir wholesale). Full 21-suite CHAIN_EXIT:0; mirrors byte-identical; state.mjs export allowlist updated.
trace.verify_output: test_lib 338/0 (incl new inject-cache migration test: legacy fallback read + cleanup); test_bee_cli 143/0 (perf-open + manifest-hash now at .bee/cache/); test_hook_contracts 0 failing (live-state fingerprint tracks .bee/cache/inject-cache.json); test_installers_e2e bash 16/0 (RUNTIME_CACHE skips .bee/cache dir). Full 21-suite chain CHAIN_EXIT:0.
trace.verify_command: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash
